SEARCH

Uses of Package
server.net

Packages that use server.net
Package
Description
server.boundary
Server JavaFX boundary: the operator GUI that starts/stops the server, shows connected clients, and streams the activity log.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.subscription
Real-time push registry: SubscriptionRegistry maps subscription keys (e.g.
  • Classes in server.net used by server.boundary
    Class
    Description
    OrderServer
    The TCP server: accepts client connections on a port, spawns a handler thread per client that reads ClientRequests in a loop and dispatches them through a RequestRouter, and runs the SchedulerService timed jobs for its lifetime.
    ServerListener
    Callback interface through which the network layer reports its lifecycle and activity to an observer — in practice the operator GUI in server.boundary.
  • Classes in server.net used by server.control
    Class
    Description
    ClientSession
    Per-connection server-side state for one client.
  • Classes in server.net used by server.net
    Class
    Description
    ClientSession
    Per-connection server-side state for one client.
    RequestRouter
    Central request dispatcher.
    ServerListener
    Callback interface through which the network layer reports its lifecycle and activity to an observer — in practice the operator GUI in server.boundary.

    Class
    Description
    ClientSession
    Per-connection server-side state for one client.
